view.params:
SELECT wfgs.wfgs
FROM wfgs

SELECT wfgs.SID,wfgs.wfgs
FROM wfgs
ORDER BY wfgs.SID ASC

常规订单
样品订单
线下订单
报关订单
备货订单

是
否

SELECT gcgm.gcgm,gcgm.SID
FROM gcgm
ORDER BY gcgm.SID ASC

预付款
正常付款

SELECT zx.mc
FROM zx
WHERE   (zx.ly="付款形式")

SELECT rtspurchaseorder.SID,rtspurchaseorder.SupplierAccountSID
FROM rtspurchaseorder
WHERE   (rtspurchaseorder.cwgc=[RTS采购合同.财务工厂])
ORDER BY rtspurchaseorder.SID ASC

SELECT top 1 kpnr.tjhl
FROM kpnr where kpnr.tjhl>0

SELECT bzyq.SID,bzyq.bzyq
FROM bzyq
ORDER BY bzyq.SID ASC

SELECT cply.cply
FROM cply

SELECT ywrybiao.SID,ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.zw like "%"+ "跟单"  +"%")
ORDER BY ywrybiao.yhm ASC

SELECT zycpfenglb.cpfl
FROM zycpfenglb
group by zycpfenglb.cpfl

SELECT zycpfenglb.yjfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[RTS采购合同.产品资料.产品大类]) group by zycpfenglb.yjfl

SELECT zycpfenglb.ejfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[RTS采购合同.产品资料.产品大类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.yjfl=[RTS采购合同.产品资料.一级分类])  group by zycpfenglb.ejfl

SELECT zycpfenglb.sjfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[RTS采购合同.产品资料.产品大类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.yjfl=[RTS采购合同.产品资料.一级分类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.ejfl=[RTS采购合同.产品资料.二级分类]) group by zycpfenglb.sjfl

SELECT bzdw.dwdm,bzdw.SID
FROM bzdw
ORDER BY bzdw.SID ASC

SELECT cymx.SID,cymx.fphm
FROM cymx
WHERE   (cymx.chyrq<>"") and (cymx.chyrq is not null) 
    AND CheckRole('出运明细')
ORDER BY cymx.SID ASC

SELECT khsp.ajbh
FROM khsp
ORDER BY khsp.ajbh desc

SELECT ywrybiao.bmjl
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.yhm=:yhm)

通过
不通过
待审批

SELECT DISTINCT(zx.wb2)
FROM zx
WHERE   (zx.ly="付款审批")  and (zx.wb1=:cgry)

SELECT mdck.ckmc
FROM mdck
ORDER BY mdck.ckmc ASC

SELECT DISTINCT(zx.wb3)
FROM zx
WHERE   (zx.ly="付款审批") and (zx.wb1=:cgry)

SELECT zycpfenglb.sjfl
FROM zycpfenglb
WHERE   (zycpfenglb.cpfl=[专属产品.产品大类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.yjfl=[专属产品.一级分类])
   AND  (zycpfenglb.ejfl=[专属产品.二级分类]) group by zycpfenglb.sjfl

SELECT cyzglsheet.xm
FROM cyzgl,cyzglsheet
WHERE   (cyzgl.SID=cyzglsheet.PID)
   AND  (cyzgl.zm="特殊合同号")  group by cyzglsheet.xm

SELECT DISTINCT(kh.ssdq)
FROM kh

ORDER BY kh.ssdq ASC

SELECT bgmxd.fphm,bgmxd.SID
FROM bgmxd
WHERE   ((:qxjb1=2) OR ((:qxjb1 =0) AND (bgmxd.sys_owner=:c_user)) OR ((:qxjb1 =1) AND (bgmxd.sys_path like :c_depart)))
ORDER BY bgmxd.SID ASC

SELECT cnshengf.zwmc
FROM cnshengf group by cnshengf.zwmc
ORDER BY cnshengf.zwmc ASC

SELECT cnshengf.SID,cnshengf.ywmc
FROM cnshengf
WHERE   (cnshengf.zwmc=:zwmc)
ORDER BY cnshengf.SID ASC

SELECT dxkzsheet.SID,dxkzsheet.xznr
FROM dxkz,dxkzsheet
WHERE   (dxkz.SID=dxkzsheet.PID)
   AND  (dxkz.zdmc="验货审请")
   AND  (dxkz.szmk="采购跟单")
ORDER BY dxkzsheet.SID ASC

SELECT dxkzsheet.SID,dxkzsheet.xznr
FROM dxkz,dxkzsheet
WHERE   (dxkz.SID=dxkzsheet.PID)
   AND  (dxkz.zdmc="验货审请")
   AND  (dxkz.szmk="采购跟单")
ORDER BY dxkzsheet.SID ASC

SELECT cymx.fphm,cymx.SID
FROM cymx
WHERE   ((:qxjb1=2) OR ((:qxjb1 =0) AND (cymx.sys_owner=:c_user)) OR ((:qxjb1 =1) AND (cymx.sys_path like :c_depart)))
ORDER BY cymx.SID ASC

SELECT dxkzsheet.SID,dxkzsheet.xznr
FROM dxkz,dxkzsheet
WHERE   (dxkz.SID=dxkzsheet.PID)
   AND  (dxkz.zdmc="验货审请")
   AND  (dxkz.szmk="采购跟单")
ORDER BY dxkzsheet.SID ASC

SELECT DISTINCT(kh.ssdq)
FROM kh

ORDER BY kh.ssdq ASC

是
